g.text: Interactive workshop for data, LLMs, CV, RAG, and fine-tuning
Trace the workshop narrative, inspect section highlights, and use search plus focus cycling to move through the curriculum fast.
/ search · Tab switch focus · Enter open · l launch
LLMs have a knowledge cutoff and can't access your private data.
**Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** solves this by adding a retrieval step
before generation: search a knowledge base for relevant documents, inject them into
the prompt, and let the model answer grounded in real sources.
